/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/messenger_client.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmessenger_client.so -o libmessenger_client.so CMakeFiles/messenger_client.dir/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/messenger_client.dir/messenger_client_api.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libboost_thread.so.1.89.0 /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -lsodium -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libboost_atomic.so.1.89.0 /usr/local/lib/libboost_chrono.so.1.89.0 /usr/local/lib/libboost_container.so.1.89.0 /usr/local/lib/libboost_date_time.so.1.89.0
